+ "\n\nFix: Correct format is:\nA>PrimaryTool(params)|SecondaryTool1(params);SecondaryTool2(params)\n\nExample: A>L(k:[meeting],u:1)|E(k:[meeting])"
+ "\n\nFix: Format must be: A>PrimaryTool(params) or D>PrimaryTool(params)\nPrimary tool is the most likely data source."
+ "\n\nFix: Only include parameters with actual values.\nOmit parameters completely if no value available.\nCorrect: E(k:[test],d:\"Jan 10\")\nWrong: E(k:[test],d:null)"
+ "\n\nFix: Provide search parameters inside parentheses.\nExample: A>E(k:[dentist])|L(k:[dentist],u:1)"
+ "\n\nFix: Use compact format with valid tool codes and parameters.\nExample: A>L(k:[dentist],u:1)|E(k:[dentist])"
+ "\n\nFix: Use compact format: A>Tool(params)|SecondaryTool(params)\n- A = searchForAnswers, D = searchForDocuments\n- Use tool codes (E, M, L, etc.) not full names\n- Parameters: k:[keywords], d:date, l:location, etc."
+ "\n\nFix: Use format A>Tool(param:value,param:value)|Secondary(params)\nExample: A>X(k:[dentist],u:1)|L(k:[dentist],u:1)"
+ "\n\nFix: Use | to separate primary from secondaries, ; to separate multiple secondaries.\nFormat: A>Primary(params)|Secondary1(params);Secondary2(params)\nExample: A>E(k:[meeting])|M(k:[meeting]);L(k:[meeting])"

+ "Based on the provided personal data sources and user query, please return an answer to the query in a json format as illustrated in the examples below.\nIf multiple possible answers exist to the user query, each potential answer to the query should be a different entry in the answer_responses field.\nIf no answer exists for the user query, the 'answer' key in the json should be set as 'NO_ANSWER_FOUND_IN_SOURCE'.\n[Example 1]\n[Input]\n{\"context\":\"I am the message recipient.\",\"locale\":\"en_US\",\"personal_data_sources\":[{\"calendar_1\":\"Calendar event: Dental Appointment . It starts at Tuesday, Jul 11, 2023 at 8:00 AM PDT. It ends at Tuesday, Jul 11, 2023 at 9:00 AM PDT. Event notes: (650)345-5300.\"}],\"query\":\"At what time is my appointment\"}\n[End of Input]\n\n[Output]\n{\"answer_responses\": [{\"answer\": \"11 Jul 2023 at 8:00 AM\", \"docs\": [\"calendar_1\"], \"dialog\": \"\"Dental Appointment\" in calendar is on **July 11, 2023 at 8 AM**.\"}]}\n[End of Example 1]\n\n[Example 2]\n[Input]\n{\"context\":\"I am Cory Laurence.\",\"locale\":\"en_US\",\"personal_data_sources\":[{\"message_1\":\"A message chat among corylaurence, Cory Laurence and 24528:<n>Wednesday, Sep 11, 2024 at 12:19 PM PDT, 24528: Your flight DL0365 from SFO on Feb 24 has been canceled due to weather conditions. You have been rebooked on flight DL1256 from San Francisco, California on Feb 25 departing at 6:30 am, with your connecting flight DL1186 from Minneapolis/St. Paul, Minnesota on Feb 25 departing at 4:19 pm.\"},{\"message_2\":\"A message chat among corylaurence, Cory Laurence and 26266:<n>Wednesday, Sep 11, 2024 at 12:19 PM PDT, 26266: It's time to check in for your flight from San Francisco. Check in now: https://fly.united.com/i5FGfHb Confirmation number: NGL7GR If your flight is departing San Francisco from Terminal 2 or 3 (D, E and F gates), you should check in and access the gate area from the Terminal 3 lobby.\"}],\"query\":\"what is the confirmation number of my flight from san francisco\"}\n[End of Input]\n\n[Output]\n{\"answer_responses\": [{\"answer\": \"NGL7GR\", \"docs\": [\"message_2\"], \"dialog\": \"An unknown sender sent a message mentioning **NGL7GR**.\"}]}\n[End of Example 2]\n\n[Example 3]\n[Input]\n{\"context\":\"I am the message recipient.\",\"locale\":\"en_US\",\"personal_data_sources\":[{\"email_1\":\"Email from Viator <email@m1.viator.com>. at Friday, Jun 9, 2023 at 9:44 AM PDT. Subject: Ke, did you enjoy yourself?. Body: Tell us how we did Psst! Don't forget to write a review.<n>Get all your thoughts down while they're fresh.<n>Rome Food Tour : Street Food Testings with Local Guide<n>Click to rate this product<n>Refer your friends and get 20% off your next booking<n>Next adventure, here we come!<n>Refer now<n>Viator, Inc., 400 First Ave, Needham, MA 02494<n>© 2023 Viator, Inc. All rights reserved.<n>Go to Viator<n>|<n>Privacy Policy<n>|<n>Terms of Use<n>Please do not reply directly to this email. This was sent from an address that cannot accept responses. For questions or assistance, visit our Help Center.<n>.\"}, {\"email_2\": \"Email from Viator <email@m1.viator.com>. at Saturday, Jun 10, 2023 at 9:27 AM PDT. Subject: Ke, did you enjoy yourself?. Body: Tell us how we did Psst! Don't forget to write a review.<n>Get all your thoughts down while they're fresh.<n>Skip the Line: Vatican Museum & St. Peter's Basilica Small Group<n>Click to rate this product<n>Refer your friends and get 20% off your next booking<n>Next adventure, here we come!<n>Refer now<n>Viator, Inc., 400 First Ave, Needham, MA 02494<n>© 2023 Viator, Inc. All rights reserved.<n>Go to Viator<n>|<n>Privacy Policy<n>|<n>Terms of Use<n>Please do not reply directly to this email. This was sent from an address that cannot accept responses. For questions or assistance, visit our Help Center.<n>.\"}, {\"email_3\": \"Email from Viator <email@m1.viator.com>. at Wednesday, Jun 7, 2023 at 9:29 AM PDT. Subject: Ke, did you enjoy yourself?. Body: Tell us how we did Psst! Don't forget to write a review.<n>Get all your thoughts down while they're fresh.<n>Rome Street Food Tour with Local Guide<n>Click to rate this product<n>Refer your friends and get 20% off your next booking<n>Next adventure, here we come!<n>Refer now<n>Viator, Inc., 400 First Ave, Needham, MA 02494<n>© 2023 Viator, Inc. All rights reserved.<n>Go to Viator<n>|<n>Privacy Policy<n>|<n>Terms of Use<n>Please do not reply directly to this email. This was sent from an address that cannot accept responses. For questions or assistance, visit our Help Center.<n>.\"}],\"query\":\"which tour did we do in Rome\"}\n[End of Input]\n\n[Output]\n{\"answer_responses\": [{\"answer\": \"Rome Street Food Tour with Local Guide\", \"docs\": [\"email_1\", \"email_3\"], \"dialog\": \"Viator sent an email mentioning **Rome Street Food Tour with Local Guide**.\"}, {\"answer\": \"Vatican Museum & St. Peter's Basilica Small Group\", \"docs\": [\"email_2\"], \"dialog\": \"Viator sent an email mentioning **Vatican Museum & St. Peter's Basilica Small Group**.\"}]}"
